hooks.prompt:
Before finishing, check if ANY of these files were modified during this session: .claude-plugin/plugin.json, server/package.json, server/src/index.ts, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, server/start.sh, server/src/client.ts, server/src/types.ts, .mcp.json

If yes, run `git diff --name-only` to confirm which files changed, then enforce this release checklist:

1. VERSIONING — All five version locations MUST show the same version:
   - `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` → `"version": "X.Y.Z"`
   - `server/package.json` → `"version": "X.Y.Z"`
   - `server/src/index.ts` → `version: 'X.Y.Z'` in McpServer constructor
   - `README.md` → badge `version-X.Y.Z-blue` on line 3
   - `CHANGELOG.md` → `## [X.Y.Z]` section exists at top
   Determine bump type: patch for fixes, minor for features, major for breaking changes.
   If versions are already consistent and unchanged from before the session, no bump is needed.

2. CHANGELOG — If the version was bumped, `CHANGELOG.md` MUST have a new `## [X.Y.Z] - YYYY-MM-DD` section with subsections (Added/Changed/Fixed/Removed) describing what changed. Follow Keep a Changelog format.

3. LOCK FILE — If `server/package.json` was modified, run `cd server && npm install` to update `package-lock.json`.

4. COMMIT — Stage all changed files and commit. Use prefix `fix:` for patches, `feat:` for minor, `feat!:` for major. Do NOT add any Co-Authored-By lines to the commit message.

5. TAG — Create git tag `vX.Y.Z` matching the new version.

6. VERIFY — Run `git log --oneline -1` and `git tag -l 'vX.Y.Z'` to confirm.

If NO files were modified, do nothing — just respond normally.
